headline: BD Earns Industry Top Honors for Transparency, Resiliency and Partnership
summary: BD (Becton, Dickinson and Company) (NYSE: BDX), a leading global medical technology company, has been recognized by the Healthcare Industry Resilience Collaborative (HIRC) as the only supplier to receive HIRC's inaugural Member Choice Awards across three categories, Transparency, Resiliency and Partnership. Selected by HIRC members based on real–world customer experience, the awards acknowledge suppliers whose actions strengthen supply chain transparency, resilience, and continuity of patient ca
